name: Manage Email Subscribers and Contact Lists

Your subscriber is created and added to your lists."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create User", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and enter a username to make an account for your subscriber."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Generate data", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to queue a process that will update your contact lists."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Unsubscribe or Remove a Subscriber"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To stop a subscriber from receiving your emails:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Subscribers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the checkboxes next to the subscribers you want to unsubscribe or remove."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At the bottom of the page, click the "}, {"text": "With # Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To remove from a specific list, hover over "}, {"text": "Unsubscribe from", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the specific list. Alternatively, click "}, {"text": "Delete", "bold": true}, {"text": " to remove the subscriber completely."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Export Subscribers and Contact Lists"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Subscribers are not automatically synced with your email marking integrations unless they are a customer or prospect. Instead, you will need to export your subscribers regularly and import them into your email marketing system."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There's two ways to perform the export, on the subscribers page, and contact list page."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Subscribers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type":
